name: ObjectId
notes: Row key such as Bau* or Fig*.

name: FigSiegeBuildCostRange
notes: The complete six-resource build-cost group (resv_res0..5_bau); used for siege/trap deployment cost removal.

name: BauBuildCostRange
notes: Complete six-resource building construction and repair cost group.

name: BauUpgradeCostRange
notes: Complete six-resource building upgrade cost group.

name: FigProdCostRange
notes: The complete six-resource training-cost group (resv_res0..5_aus); consumed by unit production checks and deductions.

name: FigEquipmentRefundRange
notes: Equipment-related costs/refunds; preserved to avoid disturbing UI equipment accounting and endless AI spawn behavior.

name: LineTerminatorOrPadding
notes: Observed as trailing field in some rows.

name: FactionSkillCosts
notes: Includes heilen/heileng and other skill costs.

name: UnitAvailabilityAndCosts
notes: Even indexes are currently zeroed for free production.

name: UpgradeCosts
notes: Four complete eight-level cost groups: befehl motivieren angriff verteidigung.
